summary: Records digitized swung dramatically because of staffing and a one-time project, according to DORIS's own reporting: digitization staff were temporarily reassigned in fiscal 2024 to prepare collection descriptions for a new digital-preservation platform, which held output down that year; fiscal 2025's huge jump reflects those staff returning to digitization work plus completion of a grant-funded project to digitize the 1890 census. Once that temporary project wrapped up, output dropped sharply again in early fiscal 2026.

sources.label: DORIS, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report
